summary: Evaluator verified all 27 manifest hashes, drove the real compiled server under a canary env over stdio JSON-RPC (canary/username/hostname/homedir/full-PATH all absent from stdout+stderr while the server genuinely responded), proved the canary assertions non-vacuous, line-level reviewed diagnostics.ts (logStartup constants-only; logFatal {event,code,scrubbed message}; process.env read only to build the redaction set, never serialized), re-ran typecheck (exit 0) and the full suite (50/50), and confirmed genuine red->green (TS2307 on absent module -> 48/48). Verdict PASS with one Minor.

findings.description: The fatal-message scrubber is verbatim-substring only (env values > 3 chars, homedir/username/hostname) and cannot catch transformed/encoded secrets; stack/cause dropped rather than scrubbed. Honestly documented; the fixed field allowlist is the primary control, scrubber is defense-in-depth.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
